summary: Completed frontend testing of FALINTIL-FDTL PMS Iteration 7. All 5 requested features verified successfully via Playwright automation.

issues: Chart dimension warnings in console (width/height -1) - cosmetic issue, charts render correctly

seed_data_creation: Using existing test members: TEST001-TEST005. João Manuel da Silva (TEST001) has 54 anos and 2 languages (Tétum, Português) with all abilities.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 features verified working: 1) Dashboard shows 'Alerta de Reserva - 1 Ano Antes' (renamed from 'Alerta 55 Anos') - VERIFIED, 2) Dashboard shows text 'Membros com 54 anos que entrarão na reserva (55 anos) no próximo ano' - VERIFIED, 3) Línguas tab shows ✓ checkmarks for true abilities (Falar ✓, Escrever ✓, Ler ✓, Ouvir ✓) instead of dots - VERIFIED, 4) Print dropdown has 'Imprimir Step Atual' option - VERIFIED, 5) Print dropdown has 'Imprimir Dados Completos' option - VERIFIED.

feature_1_alerta_reserva_label.verification: Dashboard shows 'Alerta de Reserva - 1 Ano Antes (1 membro(s))' card title. Old text 'Alerta 55 Anos' is NOT present.

feature_2_reserva_description_text.verification: Dashboard shows description text: 'Membros com 54 anos que entrarão na reserva (55 anos) no próximo ano:' with João Manuel da Silva (TEST001, 54 anos) listed.

feature_3_linguas_checkmarks.verification: Línguas tab shows ✓ checkmarks for true abilities. João Manuel da Silva has 2 languages (Tétum and Português) with all 4 abilities (Falar, Escrever, Ler, Ouvir) showing ✓ instead of dots. Total 16 checkmarks found (8 per language × 2 languages).

feature_4_print_step_atual_option.verification: Print dropdown (data-testid='print-dropdown') contains 'Imprimir Step Atual' option (data-testid='print-step-option').

feature_5_print_dados_completos_option.verification: Print dropdown contains 'Imprimir Dados Completos' option (data-testid='print-all-option').

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/print_dropdown_options.png - Print dropdown with both options visible
